lines: I am the Oldwood Roadward, and Oswin's blue oat-string is already tied to your pack. That is a small good sign on a road that likes large arguments.
Let me knot it to the bend-post. If the forest forgets your name, it may still remember your manners.
The blue knot is speaking for you at the bend. Walk politely; Oldwood likes a traveler who arrives already introduced.
I am Mabli Greenmantle, roadward of the first bend. Hearthwake sends most feet east, but only some remember to greet the road.
